category_sources: Official libnice homepage describes libnice as the GLib ICE implementation and reference manual covers ICE, STUN, TURN, and pseudo TCP.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title: libnice - The GLib ICE implementation.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the generated reference manual for the latest released version.
Official reference manual documents ICE Library, STUN Library, TURN usage, and pseudo TCP socket APIs.
repo_sources: Official homepage says libnice is available from its freedesktop.org GitLab repository and that merge requests go there, not mirrors.
tags_sources: Official homepage and reference manual describe ICE, STUN/TURN, pseudo TCP, and GStreamer elements.
